name: generate_scene
description: Generate an anime background scene image.

environment.description: The physical setting. E.g. 'ancient forest shrine', 'rain-soaked city alley', 'clifftop lighthouse at sea'

mood.description: One or two words. E.g. 'melancholic', 'tense and quiet', 'warm and safe', 'eerie'

focal_detail.description: The single most important visual element — what the camera is pointing at. One concrete thing, not a list. E.g. 'a stone torii gate half-swallowed by vines', 'a dim lantern reflected in a puddle'

palette_override.description: Optional. Only include if mood/lighting won't naturally imply the right colors. E.g. 'desaturated blues and grays', 'vivid warm oranges'
